verdict_summary: Indefinite loading dots in bot bubble after 30+s — identical to #778 user-visible outcome, which is the EXPECTED/SUCCESSFUL diagnostic outcome (test goal was engine-side log capture, not user breakthrough).

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: DevTools Console: 22 issues (20 cookie/CORS warnings + 2 misc), 1 warning, 19 info, 3 verbose, 0 errors visible in default filter; nothing surfaced indicating engine-side block message.

recommendation: dev should grep etap.log for [APF:character_inject_diag] for run_id 20260511-083403-68279 to retrieve req_id_extracted + chat_id_extracted values. If extraction empty → c2s key name differs (try chatId camelCase, nested paths). If populated but bundle still drops → chat_id hypothesis disproven, pivot to next direction.
notes: Test executed cleanly: hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) → DevTools opened (F12, Console tab) BEFORE submit → William Afton chat opened (URL: character.ai/chat/nteduPnSvnccniXWYrcAOlePtzG0N2LGd7F9Rcm4dDw) → PII prompt typed and submitted via Enter. User outgoing bubble (HealthyWorm4019) shows the RRN as expected (this is the user typing it, NOT a leak). Bot bubble shows loading dots indefinitely beyond 30s timeout. RRN decode absent → S2 holds. Same scenario/outcome as #778 (7th iter); diag log capture was the goal.
